title: Settings
subtitle: Manage API access, interface preferences, default folders, and assistant behavior.
llmDebugDesc: Inspect the last 25 raw request bodies sent to the model (system prompt, messages, tools) and their raw output. Kept in memory only and cleared on restart.
llmDebugEmpty: No records yet. Send a message, then click Refresh.
llmDebugRequest: Request (HTTP body sent to the model)
archivesOverviewDesc: Review chats that were removed from the active sidebar. You can open, restore, or permanently delete them here.
archivesSearchEmpty: No archived chats match your search.
archivesOffline: Connect the local runtime to refresh archived chats.
archivesDeleteConfirmDesc: This archived chat will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
clawEnabledDesc: When enabled, the Feishu / Lark phone bridge and local IM webhook can run in the background. Turning it off does not affect normal GUI chats.
clawDefaultWorkspaceDesc: Leave this empty to use the GUI default working directory. Individual phone connections can still override it.
clawManageAgentsEmpty: No phone agent has been connected yet. Use Connect phone to bind Feishu / Lark first.
clawManageAgentNamePlaceholder: Name shown in the IM sidebar
clawManageAgentDescriptionPlaceholder: Example: Handles project questions in the team chat
clawManageAgentIdentityPlaceholder: Define who this agent is, its role, scope, and boundaries.
clawManageAgentPersonalityPlaceholder: Define tone, style, patience, and when it should ask follow-up questions.
clawManageAgentUserContextPlaceholder: Long-lived user, team, or workflow context this phone agent should remember.
clawManageAgentReplyRulesPlaceholder: Define reply format, length, risk checks, or confirmation rules.
clawTelegramConnectDesc: Enter the Bot Token from @BotFather so this computer can receive Telegram private messages.
clawTelegramConnectStep1: Open Telegram, then search for and open @BotFather.
clawTelegramConnectStep2: Send /newbot, follow the prompts to set the bot name and username, then copy the Bot Token.
clawTelegramConnectStep3: Paste the Bot Token below. To restrict access to specific private chats, enter their Chat IDs.
clawTelegramConnectStep4: Click Connect, then send the bot a private message in Telegram to start using it.
clawTelegramConnectedHint: {{bot}} is connected and its credentials are saved locally. Kun creates or restores the matching conversation when you open this IM channel or when the first Telegram private message arrives. Phone-connection conversations live in the IM view, not in the main project list.
clawSkillAllowlistDesc: One skill name per line. Phone connections and scheduled tasks use these skill hints first.
clawExtraSkillDirsDesc: Optional local skill folders to make available to the AI assistant.
clawPromptPrefixDesc: Added before phone messages and scheduled task prompts.
clawPromptPrefixPlaceholder: Example: You are my personal automation assistant. Identify the source before answering.
codePromptPrefixDesc: These instructions are injected before every Code mode conversation. Use for global rules, coding conventions, or persistent preferences.
codePromptPrefixPlaceholder: Example: Always write unit tests for new code. Prefer functional components over class components. Use TypeScript strict mode conventions.
clawRunModeDesc: Default handling mode for phone messages and scheduled tasks.
clawFeishuStreamDesc: Stream the reply character-by-character in a live SDK card, instead of sending a one-shot message after the run completes.
clawModelDesc: Choose automatic, Pro, or Flash model routing.
clawWorkspaceOverrideDesc: Leave empty to use the default working directory.
clawTasksDesc: Each task sends its prompt to the AI assistant on the configured schedule.
clawTaskPromptPlaceholder: Example: Summarize recent workspace changes and list follow-ups.
themeDesc: Light, dark, or match the operating system.
onboardingPreviewDesc: Reopen the basic setup flow shown on first launch.
legacyImportDesc: Bring conversations from a previous DeepSeek GUI installation into Kun.
legacyImportNoneFound: No previous conversations found on this computer.
legacyImportResultNone: No conversations were found to import.
legacyImportRestartDetail: Imported {{count}} conversation(s). Restart the runtime now to load them into the sidebar?
fontScaleDesc: Adjust the overall UI text size.
cursorSpotlightDesc: Show a soft cursor-follow spotlight on the title bar and sidebar.
cursorSpotlightColorDesc: Use the tone bar to tune the spotlight from deep to bright. The default keeps Kun's current soft blue.
turnCompleteNotificationDesc: Show a native Windows/macOS notification when the AI assistant finishes replying.
desktopOpenAtLoginDesc: Start Kun automatically after you sign in.
desktopOpenAtLoginUnsupportedDesc: Open at login is available on Windows and macOS.
desktopStartMinimizedDesc: Keep the main window hidden during Windows login startup.
desktopStartMinimizedDisabledDesc: Enable Open at login first. This option applies to Windows startup.
desktopCloseToTrayDesc: Hide the window to the system tray when it is closed.
desktopCloseActionDesc: Choose what happens when the main window close button is pressed.
shortcutCaptureHint: Press the new shortcut. Press Esc to cancel.
shortcutTogglePlanModeDesc: Switch the composer between Agent and Plan mode.
shortcutNewChatDesc: Start a new chat in the current workspace.
shortcutToggleTerminalDesc: Open or close the terminal panel.
shortcutSelectAllDesc: Select content in the focused view.
shortcutToggleMaximizeDesc: Maximize or restore the main window.
kunProviderDesc: Configure one or more OpenAI-compatible providers for the Agent. Each provider can have its own API key, service URL, and model list.
kunProviderSelectDesc: Choose one of the configured providers from the Providers tab.
providersDesc: API keys, service URLs, text models, and image capabilities live here. Assistant, Write, and image generation reuse these profiles.
modelProviderIdLocked: Default and preset provider IDs cannot be changed
modelEndpointCustomEndpointDesc: Uses this URL as the final endpoint. Only paths ending in /chat/completions, /completions, /responses, or /messages can be recognized; other endings are not supported.
modelProviderModelsPlaceholder: Type a model ID and press Enter
providerModelListDesc: Add models here when the provider ships new ones, or fetch them from the API. Text, image, speech, music, and video models are grouped by capability; the sections below control protocol and endpoint details.
providerModelEmpty: No models yet. Click "Add model" to configure one, or use "Fetch from API".
providerModelKindLabel: What kind of model is this?
providerModelKindChatDesc: For chat and agent tasks, with configurable vision, tool calling and reasoning.
providerModelKindImageDesc: For generating images. After saving, adjust protocol and endpoint in the "Image generation" section below.
providerModelKindSpeechDesc: For voice input transcription. After saving, adjust protocol and endpoint in the "Speech to text" section below.
providerModelKindTtsDesc: For text-to-speech. After saving, adjust protocol and endpoint in the "Speech generation" section below.
providerModelKindMusicDesc: For songs, instrumentals, or covers. After saving, adjust protocol and endpoint in the "Music generation" section below.
providerModelKindVideoDesc: For generating videos. After saving, adjust protocol and endpoint in the "Video generation" section below.
providerModelIdHint: Must match the provider API's model parameter exactly — check the provider docs or use "Fetch from API".
providerModelNonTextWarning: This ID matches image/speech keywords, so it will not appear in the chat model picker.
providerModelContextHint: Controls when conversation context is auto-compacted; copy the value from the provider docs. Empty falls back to a conservative 24K.
providerModelVisionDesc: Allow sending image attachments to this model in chat.
providerModelToolsDesc: Required for agent tasks. Only disable when the model truly lacks function calling.
providerModelReasoningDesc: Lets you adjust this model's reasoning effort next to the composer.
providerModelReasoningProtocolHint: How reasoning parameters are sent in requests. Pre-selected from the provider's endpoint format — usually no change needed.
providerModelEndpointFormatHint: Override the wire format for this model only. Use it when one provider serves some models over chat completions and others over Anthropic Messages or OpenAI Responses (e.g. OpenCode Go). Leave on "Inherit" unless a specific model needs a different format.
providerModelAliasesHint: Alternative model IDs that share this capability profile.
providerModelErrorDuplicateChat: This model is already in the list.
providerModelErrorDuplicateImage: This ID is already used by the image generation capability — pick another ID or remove it there first.
providerModelErrorDuplicateSpeech: This ID is already used by the speech-to-text capability — pick another ID or remove it there first.
providerModelErrorDuplicateTts: This ID is already used by the speech generation capability — pick another ID or remove it there first.
providerModelErrorDuplicateMusic: This ID is already used by the music generation capability — pick another ID or remove it there first.
providerModelErrorDuplicateVideo: This ID is already used by the video generation capability — pick another ID or remove it there first.
providerModelErrorContext: Context window must be a positive integer; shorthand like 128k / 1m works.
providerModelErrorNoEfforts: Select at least one reasoning effort.
providerModelImportSubtitle: Fetched {{total}} models from {{provider}}; {{existing}} are already in your list.
providerModelImportNoneMatch: No models match the current filter.
modelProviderDraftHintReady: Click Add to save this provider and switch to it.
modelProviderDraftHintNoKey: No API key yet — Add saves the configuration without making it the active provider.
writeInlineCompletionAdvancedDesc: Trigger pacing, accept threshold, and completion length. Defaults fit most cases.
writeSelectionAssistAdvancedDesc: Edit the prompts used by infographic generation and quick actions like polish. Leave empty to use the built-in defaults.
writeInfographicPromptDesc: Prompt prefix sent to the image model when generating an infographic; the selected text is appended after it.
writeQuickActionsDesc: Quick actions shown in the selection toolbar. "Edit in place" replaces the selection with the AI result (reformat); "Send to assistant" hands the selection to the sidebar (polish, explain).
writeQuickActionPromptPlaceholder: Prompt (an edit instruction in place, or chat content for the assistant)
speechToTextAdvancedDesc: Rarely needed settings such as the request timeout.
modelProviderUpdatePresetDetail: This preset already exists. Updating refreshes the endpoint and model list while keeping your API key and existing models.
modelProviderPresetMissingKeyForProbe: Enter this provider's API key first. Preset providers do not inherit the General API key.
modelProviderInvalidUrl: URL must start with http:// or https://
modelProviderDeleteInUseChat: Chat is using this provider and will fall back to the default provider.
modelProviderDeleteInUseImage: Image generation is using this provider and will switch to the custom image API.
modelProviderDeleteInUseSpeech: Speech input is using this provider and will switch to the custom speech API.
modelProviderDeleteInUseTextToSpeech: Speech generation is using this provider and will switch to the custom speech generation API.
modelProviderDeleteInUseMusic: Music generation is using this provider and will switch to the custom music generation API.
modelProviderDeleteInUseVideo: Video generation is using this provider and will switch to the custom video generation API.
modelProviderDeleteInUseWrite: Write inline completion is using this provider and will follow the chat provider instead.
modelProviderDangerHint: Deletion takes effect immediately; features using this provider fall back automatically.
modelProviderImageCapabilityDesc: Optional. Providers with this capability can be selected by Image generation without re-entering credentials.
modelProviderSpeechCapabilityDesc: Optional. Providers with this capability can be selected by speech input without re-entering credentials.
modelProviderTextToSpeechCapabilityDesc: Optional. Providers with this capability can be selected by agent speech generation without re-entering credentials.
modelProviderMusicCapabilityDesc: Optional. Providers with this capability can be selected by agent music generation without re-entering credentials.
modelProviderVideoCapabilityDesc: Optional. Providers with this capability can be selected by agent video generation without re-entering credentials.
speechToTextEnabledDesc: Adds a voice input button to the chat composer; recordings are transcribed by local Whisper or the selected provider.
speechToTextProviderDesc: Choose local Whisper, a configured provider that has speech models, or a custom speech API.
speechToTextProviderMissingKey: {{provider}} has no API key yet. Add it in Providers.
speechToTextProtocolDesc: Request shape used by the custom speech API. OpenAI Transcriptions calls {baseUrl}/audio/transcriptions; MiMo ASR sends base64 audio via chat/completions.
speechToTextApiKeyDesc: Key for the speech provider. Independent from the chat model key.
speechToTextLocalModelDesc: Downloads a quantized model from {{source}} on demand. License: {{license}}.
speechToTextLocalDownloadSourceDesc: Choose where local Whisper models are downloaded from. Download source availability is checked automatically.
speechToTextLocalModelMissing: {{model}} has not been downloaded. Estimated size: {{size}}.
speechToTextLocalModelReady: {{model}} is downloaded and available offline. Size: {{size}}.
speechToTextLocalDeleteConfirm: Delete the {{model}} model? You will need to download it again for offline use.
speechToTextModelDesc: Remote model used for speech transcription.
speechToTextLanguageDesc: Optional language hint such as zh or en. Leave empty for auto-detect.
speechToTextTestDesc: Send a built-in test clip to verify the current provider, key, and model configuration.
speechToTextTestEmptyOk: Auth and endpoint are working (the test tone having no transcript is expected).
speechToTextTimeoutDesc: Per-request timeout for the speech transcription API.
kunApiKeyDesc: Optional. Leave empty to use the Basics API key. Fill this only when chat/code assistance needs a different key.
kunApiKeyInherited: Currently using the Basics API key.
kunApiKeyMissing: No Basics API key is configured yet.
kunApiKeyOverride: Currently using an assistant-only API key.
kunBaseUrlDesc: Optional. Leave empty to use the Basics service URL. Fill this only when chat/code assistance should connect to a different service.
kunBaseUrlPlaceholder: Leave empty to use Basics service URL
kunBaseUrlInherited: Currently using the Basics service URL: {{value}}
kunBaseUrlOverride: Currently using an assistant-only service URL: {{value}}
kunAssistantAdvancedDesc: Model, assistant-only API, local port, and data path settings for advanced users.
kunDiagnosticsAdvancedDesc: Runtime abilities, tool connections, and memory records.
kunRuntimeCapabilitiesDesc: Check whether the local AI assistant service currently has web, skills, attachments, and memory available.
kunToolDiagnosticsDesc: Check connected tool sources, external tool services, skills, attachments, and memory.
kunMemoryRecordsDesc: Review memories available to this workspace, then disable or delete anything you do not want reused.
kunMemoryEmpty: No memory records are visible for this workspace.
kunBinaryDesc: Usually leave this empty so the app uses the bundled assistant service. Set a path only for local development or debugging.
kunDataDirDesc: Stores sessions, cache data, and the configuration synced from the app to the assistant service.
kunModelDesc: Default model ID used by the AI assistant when a request does not choose one.
kunTokenEconomyDesc: Reduce model context use by compacting safe tool descriptions and tool results without changing stored chat history.
kunTokenEconomySavingsEmpty: Saved tokens will start accumulating after the next request.
kunTokenEconomyAdvancedDesc: Control exactly what gets compacted, long-history guards, and the local access token.
kunTokenEconomyOptionsDesc: When context reduction is on, choose which request content is compacted before it reaches the model.
kunHistoryHygieneDesc: Before each model request, cap long tool results and tool arguments. Original chat history is kept unchanged.
kunInsecure: Allow local access without a token
kunInsecureDesc: For local development only. Other local programs can connect to the assistant service without an access token.
kunInsecureForcedDesc: Local access protection is off because no access token is set. Add a token to control this switch again.
imageGenEnabledDesc: Enables the generate_image tool in agent chats and powers infographic generation in Write. MiniMax can reuse the key from Providers; custom OpenAI-compatible image APIs are still supported.
imageGenProviderDesc: Choose a configured provider that has image models, or use a custom image API.
imageGenProviderMissingKey: {{provider}} has no API key yet. Add it in Providers.
imageGenProtocolDesc: Request shape used by the custom image API.
imageGenBaseUrlDesc: OpenAI-compatible endpoint root; the tool calls {baseUrl}/images/generations.
imageGenApiKeyDesc: Key for the image provider. Independent from the chat model key.
imageGenModelDesc: Model id sent to the provider, e.g. gpt-image-1 or Kwai-Kolors/Kolors.
imageGenModelQualityHint: For production design drafts and infographics, prefer GPT Image or Gemini image models. Current domestic image models are still inconsistent at layout and text-heavy work, and may not meet directly usable quality standards.
imageGenDefaultSizeDesc: Optional "WxH" or "auto" used when the assistant does not pick a ratio. Leave empty for the provider default. Note: 2K previews may exceed the 5 MB attachment limit; the file is still saved to the workspace.
imageGenTimeoutDesc: Per-request timeout for the image API. Image models can take minutes at high resolutions.
mediaGenerationDesc: Expose image, speech, music, and video generation as agent tools. When enabled, Kun registers generate_image, generate_speech, generate_music, and generate_video according to configuration.
textToSpeechEnabledDesc: Enables the generate_speech tool in agent chats to synthesize text into audio files.
textToSpeechProviderDesc: Choose a configured provider with TTS models, or use a custom speech generation API.
textToSpeechProviderMissingKey: {{provider}} has no API key yet. Add it in Providers.
textToSpeechProtocolDesc: Request shape used by the custom speech generation API.
textToSpeechBaseUrlDesc: Speech generation endpoint root, e.g. https://api.minimax.io or https://api.xiaomimimo.com/v1.
textToSpeechApiKeyDesc: Key for the speech generation provider. Independent from the chat model key.
textToSpeechModelDesc: Model id sent to the provider, e.g. speech-2.8-hd or mimo-v2.5-tts.
textToSpeechVoiceDesc: Optional voice id/name. MiniMax falls back to male-qn-qingse; Xiaomi can use the provider's voice value.
textToSpeechFormatDesc: Default format for generated speech files.
musicGenerationEnabledDesc: Enables the generate_music tool in agent chats to create songs, instrumentals, or covers.
musicGenerationProviderDesc: Choose a configured provider with music models, or use a custom music generation API.
musicGenerationProviderMissingKey: {{provider}} has no API key yet. Add it in Providers.
musicGenerationProtocolDesc: Request shape used by the custom music generation API.
musicGenerationBaseUrlDesc: Music generation endpoint root, e.g. https://api.minimax.io.
musicGenerationApiKeyDesc: Key for the music generation provider. Independent from the chat model key.
musicGenerationModelDesc: Model id sent to the provider, e.g. music-2.6 or music-cover.
musicGenerationFormatDesc: Default format for generated music files.
videoGenerationEnabledDesc: Enables the generate_video tool in agent chats, with text-to-video and optional first/last frame references.
videoGenerationProviderDesc: Choose a configured provider with video models, or use a custom video generation API.
videoGenerationProviderMissingKey: {{provider}} has no API key yet. Add it in Providers.
videoGenerationProtocolDesc: Request shape used by the custom video generation API.
videoGenerationBaseUrlDesc: Video generation endpoint root, e.g. https://api.minimax.io.
videoGenerationApiKeyDesc: Key for the video generation provider. Independent from the chat model key.
videoGenerationModelDesc: Model id sent to the provider, e.g. MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3.
videoGenerationDefaultDurationDesc: Used when the agent does not specify a duration.
videoGenerationDefaultResolutionDesc: Used when the agent does not specify a resolution.
videoGenerationTimeoutDesc: Total wait time for one video task.
videoGenerationPollIntervalDesc: How often the runtime checks asynchronous video task status.
kunAdvancedDetails: Storage, model context, and tool guards
kunAdvancedDetailsDesc: These options affect how the assistant runs internally. Per-model context policy comes from models.profiles; this page mainly adjusts fallback behavior.
kunStorageBackendDesc: Hybrid storage uses SQLite to speed up indexes. Pure JSONL does not use SQLite and is simpler for compatibility debugging.
kunStorageSqlitePathDesc: Optional. Leave empty to create the index under the assistant data folder. Used only with hybrid storage.
kunModelContextProfileDesc: Model windows and per-model compaction thresholds come from models.profiles in local config.json. DeepSeek V4 defaults to a 1M context window and starts compaction around 980k.
kunModelContextSourceFallback: No matched model profile; using fallback thresholds below
kunCompactionThresholdsDesc: These values are used only when the current model does not match models.profiles. Known models such as DeepSeek V4 use their model profile thresholds.
kunCompactionSummaryDesc: Local summaries are fast and free. Model summaries read more naturally but use an extra model request.
kunStreamIdleTimeoutDesc: Fail the turn if the model sends no data for this many milliseconds. Raise it for local LLM servers that stay silent while prefilling a large prompt; set 0 to disable the limit. Default 45000.
kunToolStormDesc: When the model repeats the exact same tool call in one turn, suppress the duplicate and ask it to change approach.
kunToolStormLimitsDesc: A larger window watches more recent tool calls. A lower threshold suppresses repeated calls sooner.
kunToolArgumentRepairDesc: Single string arguments longer than this byte count are truncated before tool execution, avoiding unusually large arguments.
portDesc: Port used by the local AI assistant service. Most users do not need to change it.
runtimeTokenDesc: Protects the assistant service running on this computer. Fill this only if another local program needs to connect to it.
configFilePathDesc: Path to the MCP external tool server JSON config.
skillsLocationDesc: Choose the folder Plugins > Skills reads from and saves to by default.
skillsPathDesc: This page only manages folder locations. Use Plugins > Skills to create or edit skills.
skillsDetectedDirsDesc: Auto-detected .agents / .claude / .codex / skills folders (workspace + global) plus your extra folders below. Toggle which ones load; duplicate skill ids are de-duplicated with earlier rows winning.
skillsDetectedDirsEmpty: No skill directories detected. Set a workspace, or add a folder below.
skillsScanDirsDesc: One local path per line. Phone connections and scheduled tasks can also use skills from these folders.
skillsActionsDesc: Create, install, and edit skills from Plugins > Skills. Settings keeps only folder-level options.
skillsRootUnavailable: This folder is unavailable. Choose a workspace-backed option or switch to a global skills folder.
mcpSearchEnabledDesc: When many external tools are connected, give the model only the most relevant tools to reduce pauses and context use.
mcpAdvancedDesc: Selection mode, candidate counts, connection config file, and save actions.
mcpSearchModeDesc: Auto filters when many tools are connected; Always filter searches for relevant tools every time; Direct gives every tool to the model.
mcpSearchLimitsDesc: Control how many tools trigger filtering and how many candidate tools are offered each time.
mcpSearchAutoThreshold: Start filtering after this many tools
mcpSearchDiagnosticsDesc: See whether external tool filtering is active and how many tools are available.
mcpPathDesc: Location of the external tool connection config file.
mcpEditorDesc: Edit MCP external tool server connections here. Model, API key, and service URL do not live in this file; they are managed by Basics and model config.
mcpFileStatusReady: The current content was loaded from the config file.
mcpFileStatusMissing: The config file does not exist yet. It will be created on first save.
mcpRuntimeHint: If saved changes do not take effect, restart the local assistant service or reopen the app.
apiKeyDesc: Required. Chats, writing, and phone connections use this by default.
apiKeySharedDesc: Required. Chats, writing, and phone connections use this by default.
baseUrlDesc: Default model service endpoint. Leave empty to use the official DeepSeek endpoint.
baseUrlSharedDesc: Default model service endpoint. Leave empty to use the official DeepSeek endpoint.
proxyUrlDesc: Route only model-service HTTP requests through a proxy. Supports http, https, socks, socks4, and socks5 URLs.
firstRunTitle: Set up the essentials before you start chatting.
firstRunSubtitle: Choose your language and model provider, then add the matching API key.
firstRunKeyHintXiaomiApi: Create a pay-as-you-go API key (sk- prefix) in the Xiaomi MiMo platform console.
firstRunKeyHintXiaomiTokenPlan: Get a Token Plan key (tp- prefix) from the Xiaomi subscription page. Plan keys and API keys are not interchangeable.
firstRunKeyHintMinimaxApi: Get a pay-as-you-go API key from the MiniMax platform's interface keys page.
firstRunKeyHintMinimaxTokenPlan: Get a subscription key from MiniMax Token Plan management. Plan keys and API keys are not interchangeable.
firstRunAutoWireSpeech: Voice input (speech to text) will be enabled automatically after saving. You can adjust it in Settings anytime.
firstRunAutoWireImage: Image generation will be enabled automatically after saving. You can adjust it in Settings anytime.
firstRunTokenPlanNoSpeech: Speech to text only works with pay-as-you-go API keys; plan keys are not accepted. Add an API key too if you want voice input.
firstRunTokenPlanNoImage: This provider's Token Plan is not configured for image generation. Add a pay-as-you-go API key too if you want images.
firstRunChangeLater: You can change these values anytime from Settings after the workbench opens.
firstRunPreviewHint: This reuses the first-launch flow; unsaved theme previews are restored when you close it.
firstRunBuyApiHint: Don't have an API key yet? Visit DeepSeek's official platform to buy official API access, then come back here to paste it in.
firstRunApiKeyValidation: Please enter the {{provider}} API key before continuing.
autoStartDesc: Recommended. The app starts the local assistant service automatically when chats, writing, or phone connections need it.
corsOriginsDesc: Additional allowed Origin values for the local HTTP server.
toolPermissionModeDesc: Controls tool confirmation and local permissions together. Changes apply on the next turn.
toolPermissionAlwaysAskDesc: Every tool call asks first; safest, but interrupts often.
toolPermissionReadOnlyDesc: Read tools run automatically; writes and commands ask first, and it can only read workspace content.
toolPermissionSensitiveAskDesc: Ordinary reads can run automatically; sensitive operations ask first, so review the risk.
toolPermissionWorkspaceWriteDesc: Can modify the workspace; reads and writes outside it require approval or are blocked.
toolPermissionBypassDesc: Never asks and has full access; highest risk, use only for trusted tasks.
permissionsBehaviorHint: Always ask: request approval before every tool call. Read only: read tools run automatically; write, edit, bash, and similar tools ask first, and reads are limited to workspace content. Sensitive operations ask: read tools can run automatically; sensitive operations ask first. Workspace write: the agent can modify the workspace; reads and writes outside it require approval. Full access: never asks and grants full access.
designQualityHint: After the agent writes or edits a frontend file (HTML/CSS/JSX/TSX/SVG), Kun automatically scans for AI-generated design tells and craft issues (purple-blue gradients, cream default backgrounds, bounce easing, nested cards, contrast, line length, missing reduced-motion, etc.) and folds the findings back to the model so it self-corrects on the next turn.
designQualityEnableDesc: On by default. When off, writing/editing frontend files runs no design-quality scan.
designQualityStrictnessDesc: Relaxed: only the most reliable AI tells. Standard: tells + general craft issues. Strict: adds heuristic rules (broader coverage, occasional false positives).
computerUseHint: Lets the agent see your screen and move the mouse / type on your behalf. It controls your real computer — enable only when you intend to supervise it, and you can stop a run at any time.
computerUseModelQualityBody: Chinese-mainland multimodal models (MiniMax, Qwen-VL, Kimi, Zhipu GLM, etc.) currently struggle with screenshot-driven visual grounding and multi-step desktop control — they often click the wrong target, fail to spot the icon they need, or trigger upstream 502s and cannot reliably complete a host-control task. For real use, prefer Claude (Sonnet / Opus vision) or GPT-class vision models; treat the domestic models as experimental for now.
computerUseEnableDesc: Registers the computer_use tool so the agent can take screenshots and drive the mouse and keyboard.
computerUseModeDesc: Auto exposes the tool only to vision (image-capable) models, which decide for themselves when to use it. Always exposes it to every model. Off keeps it registered but hidden.
computerUsePermissionsDesc: macOS requires Accessibility (for mouse/keyboard) and Screen Recording (for screenshots). Grant both, then re-check.
computerUseRestartHint: Accessibility is enabled in System Settings, but macOS only applies it after the app restarts. Fully quit Kun and reopen it, then re-check.
autoApplyBlocked: Fix the port to apply changes
workspaceRootDesc: First launch uses ~/.kun/default_workspace by default, and you can change it to another directory.
writeWorkspaceRootDesc: Writing mode reads Markdown documents from here by default. A welcome.md file is created on first launch.
writeFontPresetDesc: Font for the writing surface — pick a comfortable face for long-form Chinese.
writeFontSizeDesc: Body text size ({{min}}–{{max}}px). Applies to the editor and preview.
writeLineHeightDesc: Body line height — larger values add more breathing room.
writeTypographyResetDesc: Restore the default font, size, and spacing.
writeAgentPresetsDesc: Configure dedicated agents for long-form writing — each agent is a persona/behavior prompt (e.g. plot coordinator, line editor, foreshadowing tracker, continuity checker). Switch between them from the selection popover in the editor. Off by default; add what you need.
writeAgentPersonaPlaceholder: Describe this agent's persona, role, and behavior rules…
writeInlineCompletionEnabledDesc: Show gray continuation suggestions in the Markdown editor that you can accept with Tab.
writeInlineCompletionRetrievalDesc: Before generating a suggestion, quickly reference Markdown files in the writing workspace so terminology, facts, and style stay consistent.
writeInlineCompletionProviderDesc: Leave this inherited to use the AI assistant provider, or choose another configured provider for writing suggestions.
writeInlineCompletionBaseUrlDesc: Writing suggestions use the Basics service URL by default. Fill this only if writing should connect to a different service.
writeInlineCompletionBaseUrlInherited: Currently using the Basics service URL: {{value}}
writeInlineCompletionBaseUrlOverride: Currently using a writing-specific service URL: {{value}}
writeInlineCompletionApiKeyDesc: Optional. Leave empty to inherit the General API key; fill this only when Write should use a different key.
writeInlineCompletionApiKeyInherited: Currently inheriting the General API key.
writeInlineCompletionApiKeyMissing: No General API key is configured yet.
writeInlineCompletionApiKeyOverride: Currently using a writing-only API key.
writeInlineCompletionModelDesc: Leave this empty to use the assistant's default model. Fill it only if writing suggestions need their own model.
writeInlineCompletionModelPlaceholder: Leave empty to use assistant model
writeInlineCompletionDebounceDesc: How long the editor waits after typing stops before showing a suggestion. Shorter is more responsive; longer is quieter and saves requests.
writeInlineCompletionThresholdDesc: Controls how often suggestions appear. Stricter settings show fewer, steadier suggestions.
writeInlineCompletionMaxTokensDesc: Higher numbers allow longer suggestions. Keep this short so suggestions feel like the next few lines, not a full draft.
writeInlineLongCompletionDesc: When the cursor rests longer at a line end or paragraph boundary, show a fuller next sentence or paragraph idea.
writeInlineLongCompletionMaxTokensDesc: Controls the maximum length for paragraph inspiration suggestions, best for about one paragraph of continuation.
writeInlineCompletionApiNote: These settings only affect automatic suggestions in Writing mode. Provider credentials are configured in Providers. Press Tab to accept and Esc to hide.
writeDebugLogDesc: View recent writing suggestion requests and responses to understand why suggestions did not appear or felt off.
writeDebugLogModalDesc: Inspect the context sent for writing suggestions, raw model responses, and parsed output.
writeInlineEditDebugDesc: Inspect recent writing edit calls, including what was sent to the model, the raw response, and the parsed action, so it is easier to tell whether a problem came from the request, model output, or app handling.
writeInlineEditDebugEmpty: No text edit calls yet. Run AI Edit on a selection and the calls will appear here.
writeCompletionDebugEmpty: No writing suggestion calls yet. Trigger a writing suggestion and the calls will appear here.
writeApiKeyDesc: Writing completion and the writing assistant inherit the General API key unless a Write override is set.
apiKeyRequiredBody: Add an API key in Providers first. Once entered, the app can start the local AI assistant service for you.
guiUpdateChannelDesc: Stable is the default; Frontier is only used after you switch to it. Stable only receives formal stable releases.
guiUpdateDesc: Check the selected release channel for GUI updates, then download and install in the app.
guiUpdateCheckFailed: Could not check for GUI updates
guiUpdateErrNotConfigured: Update checking isn't available right now.
guiUpdateErrUnsupported: This build does not support in-app automatic updates. Open the download page to install manually.
guiUpdateErrRepoNotFound: The update source «{{repo}}» wasn't found or isn't reachable on GitHub.
guiUpdateErrForbidden: Couldn't fetch update information. Try again later.
guiUpdateErrRateLimit: Too many requests. Try again later.
guiUpdateErrNoStableVersion: No stable release or tag to compare yet (for example v0.1.0). Repo: {{repo}}.
guiUpdateAvailableManual: New version available: {{current}} → {{latest}}. Install it from the download page.
guiUpdateDownloadedDesc: Restart the app to install the new version.
logDirDesc: App error logs and local assistant service output are written to daily files in this folder.
logEnabledDesc: Write tool call errors, request failures, app errors, and local assistant service output to log files. Logs are cleaned up automatically.
logRetentionDesc: Delete log files older than the selected number of days.
preloadBridgeError: The app bridge is not available. Restart the application or check the preload path.
uiModeWorkshopDesc: Pick the workspace mascot pack. The built-in iKun mode is itself a pre-installed UI plugin example — build and install your own packs with the developer guide (declarative image packs, no executable code).
uiPaletteRetromaOn: Retroma palette on — click to use default palette
uiPluginEmpty: No UI plugins installed. The bundled iKun example may have been removed; install a plugin folder, or build one with the developer guide.
worktreeOverviewDesc: View Git worktrees checked out from conversations and clean up worktree directories you no longer need.
worktreeEmptyList: No conversation worktrees for the current project yet.
worktreeForceConfirm: This worktree has {{count}} uncommitted change(s). Force-reset will discard them. Continue?
worktreeNotGitRepo: The current workspace is not a Git repository. Worktrees require a Git project — please select one in General settings.
memoryOverviewDesc: Memory records persist facts and preferences across sessions. They are injected into the assistant's context automatically and can be edited here.
memoryRecordsDesc: Create, edit, disable or delete memory records. Changes take effect on the next turn.
memoryEmpty: No memory records yet. The assistant will create them automatically as it learns your preferences, or add one manually.
memoryContentPlaceholder: What should the assistant remember? e.g. "Prefer TypeScript with 2-space indentation."
memoryLastInjectedDesc: Memory record IDs that were injected into the most recent turn.
memoryDisabledHint: Memory is currently disabled. Enable it in the runtime configuration (kun config) to create and use memory records.
memoryEnableDesc: When enabled, the assistant persists facts and preferences across sessions and injects them into context automatically. Changes apply on the next turn.
